items.title: Android version
items.summary: Bring Beadlight to Android so more people can pray with the app.

items.title: Expanded guided audio mode
items.summary: Improve the guided Rosary experience with clearer pacing and richer audio support.

items.title: Prayer completion stats
items.summary: Track completed Rosaries and total prayers prayed through Beadlight.

items.title: Daily prayer reminders
items.summary: Gentle reminders to help people build a consistent Rosary habit.

items.title: Prayer intentions journal
items.summary: A private place to keep intentions before starting a Rosary.

items.title: Public social feed
items.summary: Beadlight is intended to remain calm, focused, and distraction-free.
